card_eligibility.source_phrase: Present a photo ID and proof of your current address at any Circulation Desk. Massachusetts residency is required to get your library card and some services are restricted to Winchester residents only.
card_eligibility.source_block:
Get a Library Card

It’s Easy!

Present a photo ID and proof of your current address at any Circulation Desk. Massachusetts residency is required to get your library card and some services are restricted to Winchester residents only. Complete requirements are available in our policy manual .
